changelog: v1.2.2: Fix thread safety & race conditions di auth/session, task list, dan toast â€” tambah lock untuk semua shared state; fix COM resource leak di macro recorder (CoUninitialize di finally); fix memory leak di shown_keys (dict insertion-order); fix app hang saat close (daemon thread + PriceMonitor join); fix rate limiter rekening (sleep di luar lock); fix timer cancel pakai root.after_cancel; async UIA capture agar pynput tidak blocked
